items.name: Crispy Lechon Backpack
items.description:
Who says you can’t bring the feast with you? Rock the 🐖 Crispy Lechon Backpack 🐖 and serve some sizzling style wherever you go! This backpack doesn’t just carry your gear, it carries a whole vibe. With its ultra-crisp design and a snout that’s too cute, it’s ready to turn heads and make your friends LOL. 

It’s not just a backpack,  it’s a party starter. Get yours and let the good times roll!

Limited Item

items.name: Green OV-1C "Marksman" Goggles
items.description:
OV-1 "C" Variant offers an upgraded sensor package, with a direct uplink to command modules assigned to you. Essentially, whatever you see, can be instantly uploaded to your team leader, or command element with a push of a button. However it is not recommended to travel alone with this system, as it is incredibly expensive...
